/usr/bin/c++ -std=c++17  -O3 -Wall -DNDEBUG -rdynamic CMakeFiles/example_lidar_udp.dir/examples/example_lidar_udp.cpp.o -o /home/phom/Projects/sensorPlatform/src/unilidar_sdk2/unitree_lidar_sdk/bin/example_lidar_udp   -L/home/phom/Projects/sensorPlatform/src/unilidar_sdk2/unitree_lidar_sdk/lib/x86_64  -Wl,-rpath,/home/phom/Projects/sensorPlatform/src/unilidar_sdk2/unitree_lidar_sdk/lib/x86_64 -Wl,-Bstatic -lunilidar_sdk2 -Wl,-Bdynamic
